item.title: I've spent 30 years playing and 25 years DMing D&D. Roleplaying is hard... So over time I made this. Questions to get to know the new you better.
item.description:
I based the basic structure off of the Gotham and Proust Questionnaires, along with more D&D/RPG specific questions in between.
In short? It's 72 questions that by the time you're done answering them? You know your character.
I've broken them up into general categories and added/subtracted over the years, but these are what I feel (at least today) will get the best bang for your buck.
I love a good resource share so I'd figured I'd share it with the nerds I know (just remember me fondly to your friends and fellow players)
Does it seem like a lot? Sure. But it beats 17 pages of backstory for a 1st level fighter about how awesome they probably were sometime ago.
If you enjoy this? I'm glad I could help. Questions? Feel free to message. Other than that.... Good luck, and Dovie'andi se tovya sagain, — Midnight.
item.dc:creator: MidnightLibrarian

item.title: I've probably read hundreds of headlines about this, and this one has the best wording of them all.
item.description: Right to the point. https://futurism.com/neoscope/americans-unitedhealthcare-tried-kill-first

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
it was a great show.. her attractiveness was a bonus. greetings online friends
Jenny Craig is an American weight loss company
better snatch that up
that's unsettling
mmm hmm
oh no what is you doing?
pretty much
do it
i guess
haters will say this isn't real
oh, Derek. i have no qualms with you ftr
i have a few concert posters i want to frame.. any alternate options?
someone in the comments will help if you are too young for this one
but it's the hot item this year!
i'm on team rocket
peent
sounds difficult
that's my time.. have a great weekend gang!!

item.title: During a live concert, The Warning's main singer Dany forgets the lyrics. Her sister and drummer Pau quickly catches on and takes the lead in her place.

item.title: My newest hobby, building unconventional furniture with wood and metal
item.description:
Bookkshelf - shelves slant so the books don't fall over
Just finished today
3-leg cocktail table. Doesn't wobble even on uneven floor tile
New Mexico skies
Simple corner shelves with wall hugging brackets
item.dc:creator: ProCycle

item.title: Working on obstacles part 2.
item.description: Last week was my birthday. This week I got really sick and haven't been able to go to therapy. I'm getting better and looking forward to returning to therapy. I hope everyone is doing well and has a great weekend.

item.title: A Birthmas Post
item.description: Today is my cakeday ? But I want to take this chance to give a shout out to all my fellow December babies who have their day overshadowed by the spectre of Christmas. I see you and share that pain. Happy Birthday to all that it applies to this month! ??
item.dc:creator: RespectableReject

item.title: I think I missed my Cake Day???
item.description: As an exclusively mobile user, I can't see my anniversary date. I think my Cake Day was December 12th, so here's an old favorite :)
